design_philosophy: Objective, clear, and structured. Focuses on content legibility and high contrast. Mobile-first app-like interface inspired by ClassPlus, focusing on progressive disclosure and card-based feeds.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Mobile screens use p-4 to p-6, desktop uses p-8 to p-12.
spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

grid_modes.bento_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
grid_modes.course_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8

spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Cardless or 1px subtle borders on cards. No deep shadows. Use border-slate-200 (light) and border-slate-800 (dark). BorderRadius: rounded-xl to rounded-2xl.

navigation.mobile: Bottom Tab Navigation with fixed positioning, z-50, icons (Home, Courses, Live, Profile).
navigation.desktop: Top Navbar with Logo, Search, Navigation Links, Profile Dropdown. z-50 sticky.
navigation.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-right (above bottom nav on mobile). Color: #25D366. Icon-only with pulse animation.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.accent: bg-accent text-accent-foreground rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(255,184,0,0.39)] hover:bg-accent/90 transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-secondary transition-all

hero_section.style: Two-column on desktop, stack on mobile. Background: soft gradient or abstract geometric. Large H1, clear subtext, 'Join Live Classes' primary CTA.
hero_section.image_treatment: Image wrapped in a card with subtle floating elements (e.g., student stats, floating icons).

teacher_profile.style: Card with image, name 'Praveen Pareek', subject tags, and bio. Use horizontal layout on desktop, stack on mobile.

course_details.layout: Hero image/video player at top (16:9). Underneath, a Shadcn Tabs component for 'Syllabus/Lessons', 'PDFs', 'Assignments'. Sticky enroll CTA at the bottom on mobile.

payment_verification.style: Card-based form. Display Admin UPI QR code prominently. Below, an input to upload screenshot. Use clear status indicators (Pending/Approved) with distinct colors.

video_player.style: Widescreen 16:9 container, dark background, custom controls if possible. Overlay title.

interactions.hover_states: Buttons and cards must lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow/border contrast.
interactions.active_states: Buttons must use 'active:scale-95' for tactile mobile feel.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' (e.g., data-testid='enroll-button', data-testid='whatsapp-fab').

hero_background.description: Abstract blue geometric pattern for header/hero backgrounds to give a professional tech-edu vibe.

student_learning.description: Student focused on laptop - use for Hero or About Us section.

student_studying.description: Student making notes - use for course promotion or testimonials.

teacher_portrait_1.description: Teacher portrait - use for Praveen Pareek's profile section.

upi_qr_placeholder.description: Use a generic placeholder or an abstract image for the QR code container until admin uploads.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first responsive web app using React, Tailwind, and Shadcn UI.
Implement a Bottom Navigation Bar for mobile viewports (hidden on lg+ screens).
Use standard semantic HTML. Build custom components for marketing sections but use Shadcn for forms, tabs, dropdowns, and dialogs.
For the course detail screen, strictly follow the mobile app patterns: sticky bottom CTA for 'Enroll', tabs for different course contents.
Ensure the floating WhatsApp button is always accessible but doesn't overlap the bottom navigation on mobile.
Support Dark Mode via Tailwind's 'dark:' classes, prioritizing slate/slate-900 combinations.
Apply 'data-testid' to EVERY form input, button, and navigation link.
Avoid using raw tags; wrap them in div containers with aspect-ratio, bg-slate-100, and object-cover to prevent layout shifts.
For the admin panel, use a Sidebar layout on desktop and a hamburger menu on mobile.
